title: stelis aquinoana
intro: Stelis aquinoana is a species of orchid native to the Philippines. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Filipino medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments. The plant is believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Stelis aquinoana is often made into a decoction or infusion, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
